detailed_description: This video captures the serene and aesthetic process of brewing fresh coffee using an espresso machine. Steam rises from the portafilter as a rich stream of coffee pours directly into a speckled ceramic mug, held gently by a person's hands. The warm, natural light illuminates the scene, highlighting the rich crema forming in the cup. It emphasizes the simple pleasure and quality experience of making and enjoying a handcrafted coffee.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is the Semantic Core, showcasing the complete process of coffee pouring from an espresso machine into a cup, representing both the product interaction and the appealing final result. It starts immediately with the action and ends as the coffee is still being poured, adhering to the 'no-mistake' rule by keeping 100% of the duration.
